title: Broken Open
author: David Richo
subline: How difficult times can help us grow.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A cracked egg: the bottom half (intact) is below the title. The TOP half is a shell that's broken open, with 4 fragments flying outward, and a small plant (growth) sprouting from inside. The crack is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none">
    <!-- The lower half of the egg (intact, faint outline) -->
    <path d="M -200 100 Q -200 280 0 320 Q 200 280 200 100 Z" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- The upper half of the shell, broken into 4 fragments -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <path d="M -200 100 Q -200 -180 0 -240 Q 200 -180 200 100"/>
      <line x1="-200" y1="100" x2="-30" y2="-40"/>
      <line x1="-30" y1="-40" x2="60" y2="-100"/>
      <line x1="60" y1="-100" x2="200" y2="100"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The crack seams — RED -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none">
      <line x1="-200" y1="100" x2="-30" y2="-40"/>
      <line x1="-30" y1="-40" x2="60" y2="-100"/>
      <line x1="60" y1="-100" x2="200" y2="100"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The fragments (a few jagged shell pieces) flying outward from the crack -->
    <g fill="#cccccc" stroke="none">
      <polygon points="-260,40 -220,20 -240,80 -280,60"/>
      <polygon points="-100,-100 -60,-120 -50,-80 -90,-60"/>
      <polygon points="20,-180 60,-200 70,-160 30,-140"/>
      <polygon points="120,-60 160,-80 170,-40 130,-20"/>
      <polygon points="280,40 320,20 300,80 260,60"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A small plant sprouting from the inside — the 'growth' — RED stem and ash leaves -->
    <line x1="0" y1="100" x2="0" y2="-160" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <path d="M 0 -60 Q -30 -80 -40 -40"/>
      <path d="M 0 -90 Q 30 -110 40 -70"/>
      <path d="M 0 -120 Q -25 -140 -35 -100"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A red dot at the top of the stem -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-160" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The metaphor is right in the title: 'Broken Open.' A cracked egg in the top 2/3 — the upper half shattered into fragments, the lower half intact, with 4 jagged shell pieces flying outward. The cracks themselves are RED 2.5px. From inside the broken shell, a small plant sprouts upward — the growth that comes from being broken open. The stem is red; the leaves are ash. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 300 whisper, mixed-case. Brand 'OPEN HEART' in the top-left; pill 'GROWTH' at the top.
